working_on.notes: Added fallback parse correctAnswer string to correctWordIndexes array in getAnswerStatus. Rendering detail already had this fallback.

recent_changes.description: Fixed UNDERLINE getAnswerStatus always returning wrong - added fallback parse correctAnswer string to correctWordIndexes
Fixed QuestionAnalysis TỶ LỆ ĐÚNG = 0% - added correctAnswers field for MULTIPLE_SELECT
Fixed LaTeX not rendering in QuestionAnalysisTable - replaced dangerouslySetInnerHTML with MathSpan
Fixed StudentDetailModal showing all questions as wrong - added fallback isCorrect calculation
Fixed TRUE_FALSE validation - changed isTrue to isCorrect property
Fixed MCQ validation - handle correctAnswer format 'B. Answer' vs 'B'

decisions_made.decision: Add correctAnswer fallback in getAnswerStatus for UNDERLINE
decisions_made.reason: Snapshots store correctAnswer as JSON string but not correctWordIndexes array - need to parse at display time

decisions_made.decision: Use fallback calculation for old results without isCorrect field
decisions_made.reason: Old submitted results don't have isCorrect, need to recalculate from correctAnswer

decisions_made.decision: Use MathSpan component instead of dangerouslySetInnerHTML for LaTeX
decisions_made.reason: MathSpan handles MathJax rendering properly with useLayoutEffect

decisions_made.decision: Support correctAnswers (plural) for MULTIPLE_SELECT in statistics
decisions_made.reason: MULTIPLE_SELECT uses correctAnswers array, not correctAnswer string

errors_encountered.error: UNDERLINE questions always show wrong in ResultScreen card list
errors_encountered.solution: getAnswerStatus used correctWordIndexes (empty in snapshots) without fallback to correctAnswer string
Added fallback calculation in statisticsUtils.ts + pass correctAnswers field
Added calculateIsCorrect fallback function for all question types

errors_encountered.error: LaTeX displays as raw $32$ in QuestionAnalysisTable
errors_encountered.solution: Use MathSpan component instead of dangerouslySetInnerHTML

pending_tasks.task: Add difficulty dropdown in QuizPreview edit modal
pending_tasks.notes: State logic done, only UI dropdown missing
